Quick summary:

- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Config last updated:** 2026-03-28

|---|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|

| **CU-003** | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | **2.83 mg** | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min |

Clinical notes:
- **CU-001:** Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan
- **CU-002:** Responding well; weight gain improving
- **CU-003:** New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On PK stability: **nothing in the latest dosing config looks obviously unstable or inconsistent**, and the patient notes are reassuring. That said, this was a config pull, not a full model health check, so I haven’t reviewed runtime monitoring/diagnostic outputs yet.

If you want, I can next format this into a brief email-ready note for Dr. Martinez.
